reviews.author: Jignesh Gajjar
reviews.title: Kent Supreme Plus - Best Purifier in Segment
reviews.body: Off course Kent Purifiers are good and this one is one of the best in segment i can say because it provides Alkaline, Copper and UV Led in Tank. Though Storage Capacity is bit small but for our family it suffice. Leakage till date is not observed, easy to use even by daughter do it. No issues till date, genuine service received from company.

reviews.title: Nice Product
reviews.body: Nice Product Till Now no problem had come

reviews.body: Installation done by engineer in a very professional manner.

reviews.body: The installation was very good . Srinivas jee is wonderful in his job. Explained along with the installation
